name: Roast Beef with Garlic Crust
recipeInstructions:
1. Wipe the roast clean and place it on a roasting rack.
2. Heat oil in a skillet over medium heat.
3. Add garlic and sauté for 2 minutes, pressing the juice from the garlic into the oil.
4. Discard the garlic (or finely mince it and leave it on the meat).
5. Mix together bread crumbs, chopped parsley, salt, and black pepper.
6. Press the mixture onto the roast, coating it well.
7. Insert a meat thermometer into the thickest part of the meat.
8. Roast at 325°F until the meat thermometer reads 140°F for rare (18-20 minutes per pound), 160°F for medium (20-22 minutes per pound), or 170°F for well done (22-24 minutes per pound).
9. Remove from oven and allow to rest for 15-20 minutes before carving.
